message:
docs(bench): clarify single-row insert benchmark comment to match iter_batched semantics

Update the bench_single_row_insert doc comment to accurately describe
how Criterion's iter_batched excludes setup from the timed body, rather
than implying the setup cost is included in the measured iteration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
